title: 42 Drug Batches Including Paracetamol, Metformin Fail CDSCO Quality Tests in April
summary: New Delhi: In a fresh drug safety alert underscoring continued regulatory surveillance, 42 batches of drugs, injections, syrups, tablets, medical devices, and allied healthcare products have been...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
